title: OctomuxPlan
description: Schema for plan.json artifacts written by planning sessions (spec §6.5, §5 #4). Single source of truth owned by octomux-mcp. The orchestrator holds only the file path (pointer); contents are fetched browser-side via the artifact endpoint.

schema_version.description: Schema version for format-change detection. Must match PLAN_SCHEMA_VERSION in exec.ts.

summary.description: Short human-readable summary of the plan (1–3 sentences). Used as the card title in the UI.

files.description: List of files to create/modify/delete/rename, forming the editable change list (Copilot Workspace style).

open_questions.description: Questions that need human input before or during implementation. Surfaces in the UI for the user to answer before approving.

detail.description: Optional prose body — the full plan document. Never sent to the orchestrator; rendered in the UI file viewer only.

path.description: Relative file path from the repo root.

action.description: What the worker will do to this file.

steps.description: Ordered list of concrete implementation steps for this file.
